channel.title: Hancock County Probate Court
channel.description: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Sitewide WordPress /feed/ exists but is not probate-specific. Links a statutory will form and fee schedule worth watching for updates.

item.title: Page updated: Hancock County Probate Court
item.description:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Removed: - skip to content - WELCOME TO - 50 State Street Ellsworth,ME - 207-667-9542 - Search for: - HOME - ABOUT - Stats & Info - Towns, Town Clerks - Villages of Hancock County - Unorganized Territory - Maps - Population - Organization & History - County Government - County Boundaries - Maine County Settlement by Decade 1650 – 1860 - Genealogy Information - Departments - Government - Commissioners - Treasurer’s Office - Unorganized Territory - Legal - District Attorney’s Office - Registry of Probate - Registry of Deeds - Public Safety - Hancock County Sheriff’s Office - Emergency Management Agency - RCC/E 9-1-1 Center - Animal Control - County Admin - County Administrator - Court House Maintenance - Airport - Human Resources - Information Technology (IT) - Employment - HOW DO I…? - Apply for… - US Passport - A Job - View - Commissioner Meetings - Commissioner Meeting Minutes - Mental Health Resources - Bids and Contracts - Opioid Settlement Funds Advisory Committee - Contact - Commissioners - Treasurer’s Office - Sheriff’s Office - District Attorney’s Office - News - Contact - Registry of Probate - Hancock County Registry of Probate - 50 State Street, Suite 6 - Ellsworth, Maine 04605 - (207) 667-8434 - William B. - Blaisdell IV - Judge of Probate - Ellsworth, Maine - Email - More Information - 207-667-8434 - As Judge of Probate, Mr. Blai [diff truncated]
